{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Daji's armor
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Daji's armor]] is composed of smooth gray plates with liquid silver or yellow showing through the seams.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
